extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Data Manager panel in UiPath Studio Web Agent Builder with the Inputs section open. Two input arguments are configured: IncidentShortDescription and IncidentDescription, both with type String and descriptive text filled in. The Data Manager icon in the left sidebar is selected, and the IncidentDescription description field is currently active.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the Data Manager icon in the left sidebar.
2. In the Inputs section, add or select the IncidentShortDescription argument.
3. In the Type field, select String.
4. In the Description field, enter "The short description of the ServiceNow incident".
5. Add or select the IncidentDescription argument.
6. In the Type field, select String.
7. In the Description field, enter "The description of the ServiceNow incident".
8. Optionally, check the Required box for either argument if needed.
